title: athyrium dentatum
intro: Athyrium dentatum, also known as the Toothed Lady Fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the Athyrium genus. This plant is widely used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Athyrium dentatum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and support immune function. Athyrium dentatum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used to alleviate symptoms of colds, fever, and other respiratory issues.
